_comment: Phase 0/1 reference theme for the 3D (Three.js/GLTF) render path. model.glb is a placeholder capsule+head rig with a single 'Bounce' clip — see spike-3d/gen-test-glb.mjs for how it was generated. states.* below is the required 2D fallback, shown only if the GLB fails to load.
name: Robo Test (3D)
author: DeskBuddy
description: Reference implementation for render3d — placeholder GLB, not production art.

render3d._comment: model is resolved relative to this theme's assets/ folder, same as raster assets. clips maps state name -> GLTF animation clip name; states not listed here fall back to the model's first animation clip.
